headline: QumulusAI boosts AI infrastructure with major Nvidia Blackwell GPU order
summary: QumulusAI (NASDAQ:QMLS) has announced the purchase of 1,632 Nvidia Blackwell B300 GPUs as part of a significant expansion of its AI cloud infrastructure, marking one of the company’s largest capacity investments to date. The order includes 204 Nvidia HGX B300 systems equipped with the latest Blackwell B300 GPUs, alongside an additional 192 Nvidia RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell GPUs that will be used for AI training, inference and visualisation workloads.

headline: Dell, Super Micro Stocks Rise Premarket After Elon Musk Denies Report Of $52B AI Server Deal With Foxconn
summary: Dell and Super Micro have traditionally supplied AI servers to SpaceX, and the rumored Foxconn deal would have been a blow to the companies
